creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #15)
> And what about my first question?

I tried answering that with the "It is a FreeBSD-14 upgraded from source from FreeBSD-13 only a few weeks earlier" :)

That is, I rebuilt all of the ports to have arch:14 instead of 13 at the end of November... I'll kick off a portupgrade again now...
